summary: Executive user ESPN/Sunday Night Baseball - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user has EXEC entitlement
AND ESPN Sunday Night Baseball is scheduled/live

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses a scheduled/live ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon doesn't display in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND there is no dark overlay of the team match up
AND a blackout pill does not display in the game tile
